sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_row(
		    $wpdb->prepare(
		        "SELECT id 
		         FROM $table_subscription 
		         WHERE status = %d 
		           AND unsubscribed = %d 
		           AND subscriptionType = %d 
		         LIMIT 1",
		        0,
		        0,
		        $subscriptionFormId
		    ),
		    ARRAY_A
		)
$wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare("SELECT count(*) FROM $table_subscription WHERE unsubscribed = 0 and subscriptionType = %d", $subscriptionFormId) )

$wpdb->get_results(
		    $wpdb->prepare(
		        "
		        SELECT id, firstName, lastName, email
		        FROM $table_subscription
		        WHERE status = 0
		          AND unsubscribed = 0
		          AND id >= %d
		          AND subscriptionType = %s
		        LIMIT %d
		        ",
		        $currentStateEmailId,
		        $subscriptionFormId,
		        $emailsInFlow
		    ),
		    ARRAY_A
		)
$wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare(' DELETE FROM '.$wpdb->prefix.'sgpb_analytics WHERE target_id = %d AND event_id NOT IN (7, 12, 13)', $popupId))
$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare("SELECT id FROM $table_sgpb_subscribers WHERE email = %s AND subscriptionType = %d", $email, $subscriptionPopupId), ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare("SELECT id FROM $subscribersTableName WHERE email = %s AND subscriptionType = %d", $csvData[$mapping['email']], $formId), ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare("SELECT id FROM $subscribersTableName WHERE email = %s AND subscriptionType = %d", $email, $popupPostId), ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare("SELECT COUNT(id) as countIds FROM $subscribersTableName WHERE subscriptionType = %d", $popupPostId), ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare("SELECT ID FROM $wpdb->posts WHERE post_title = %s AND post_type='popupbuilder'", $pageTitle))
$wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare( "SELECT options FROM $sg_popup_addons_connectionTableName WHERE popupId = %d and extensionType = 'option'", $popupId) , ARRAY_A)

$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare("SELECT `content`, `yesButton` as `yesButtonLabel`, `noButton` as `noButtonLabel`, `url` as `restrictionUrl` FROM $sg_age_restriction_popup WHERE id = %d", $arr['id']), ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT t.name, t.term_id	FROM $wpdb->terms AS t	INNER JOIN $wpdb->term_taxonomy AS tt ON t.term_id = tt.term_id	WHERE tt.taxonomy =  %s" , esc_sql($taxonomy) ) )
$wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $tableName_sgpb_analytics WHERE target_id = %d AND event_id NOT IN (7, 12, 13)", $popupId) )
$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare("SELECT id FROM $subscribersTableName WHERE email = %s && subscriptionType = %s", $email, $popup), ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT id, email FROM $subscribersTableName WHERE unsubscribe_token IS NULL OR unsubscribe_token = ''", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT id, firstName, lastName FROM $subscribersTableName WHERE email = %s AND subscriptionType = %s AND unsubscribed = 0",
			$email,
			$popup
		), ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare('SELECT table_name, create_time FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=%s AND table_name=%s', DB_NAME, $wpdb->prefix.'sgpb_subscribers'), ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM $subscribersTableName WHERE email = %s AND subscriptionType = %d ", $subscriberEmail, $list), ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare("SELECT id FROM $postsTableName WHERE post_type = %s", SG_POPUP_POST_TYPE), ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT ENGINE FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = %s" , $dbName), ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( "SHOW TABLE STATUS WHERE Name = '$usersTableName' AND Engine = %s", 'MyISAM' ), ARRAY_A)

$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( "
			SELECT DISTINCT YEAR( post_date ) AS year, MONTH( post_date ) AS month
			FROM $wpdb->posts
			WHERE post_type = %s
			ORDER BY post_date DESC
		", $post_type ) )

printf(wp_kses_post(__('Failed to import “%1$s”: Invalid post type %2$s', 'popup-builder')),
					esc_html($post['post_title']), esc_html($post['post_type']))

$wpdb->get_results(
		    $wpdb->prepare(
		        "
		        SELECT id, firstName, lastName, email
		        FROM $table_subscription
		        WHERE status = 0
		          AND unsubscribed = 0
		          AND id >= %d
		          AND subscriptionType = %s
		        LIMIT %d
		        ",
		        $currentStateEmailId,
		        $subscriptionFormId,
		        $emailsInFlow
		    ),
		    ARRAY_A
		)
